title: Scripted Hardcore
description: this adds a hardcore aspect to your SMP making player have a set amount of lives and if they lose all of them they get banned
body:
This plugin adds a hardcore aspect to the game allowing you to set an amount of lives a player gets this is great for scripted and non-scripted SMPs this plugin also allows operators of the server to not go below half a heart and die by a command. this would be good for main characters in stories...

# **Commands**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/382d38e0f54278bb212c8214d0d73c79198cad85.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57dab1a4a73e2ae7465748d2c2c88bfbb7364392.png)

# **Features**
> ✅ Change Max Lives
>
> ✅ Half-Heart Command
>
> ✅ Wither Death Sounds
>
> ✅ Add Lives
>
> ✅ Set Lives
> 
> ✅ Remove Lives
>

# **Config**
```
starting-lives: 2                      #

spectator-on-death: false     # (true | false)



lives: {}
```
